# CA Narender Sharma

> Expert Chartered Accountants in Whitefield, Bangalore specializing in complex tax scenarios for IT professionals, investors, and NRIs.

## About

CA Narender Sharma is a chartered accountancy firm based in The Arcade, Whitefield, Bangalore, India. With 25+ years of combined experience, the firm serves MNC employees, Fortune 500 professionals, and NRIs worldwide.

## Services

- RSU & Stock Options Taxation: Expert handling of Restricted Stock Units and employee stock option taxation with maximum savings
- Foreign Investment Tax Compliance: Complete tax compliance for foreign stock investments, FBAR filing, and international earnings
- Tax Credit Optimization: Maximize tax credits for taxes paid on dividends and other incomes in US/Europe to avoid double taxation
- Investment Planning: Strategic mutual fund investments and comprehensive tax planning for wealth building
- Property & Salary Taxation: Property transactions, capital gains optimization, and salary taxation with HRA benefits
- IT Notice Resolution: Expert handling of IT notices and assessments with 90%+ success rate

## Key Facts

- 5.0 star rating on Google
- 25+ years combined experience
- Serves clients in Bangalore and remotely worldwide
- Specializes in tech professional taxation (RSU, ESOP, foreign stocks)
- Expertise in old vs new tax regime optimization
